    How Designers Get Paid: A Simple Payment Workflow

    Written by Alexandre Magno
    Mar 28, 2026 Editar esta página

    How Designers get paid (in practice)

    Most payment delays aren’t about the work quality—they’re about unclear payment steps. A clean workflow makes “pay now” the default next action.

    The old workflow

    1. Deliver
    2. Invoice
    3. Wait
    4. Follow up

    The modern workflow (payment requests)

    1. Deliver the milestone
    2. Send a payment request link
    3. Client pays (or forwards internally)

    Example deliverables

    • Logo + brand kit delivery
    • Website design handoff
    • Branding project milestone
    • UI screens + Figma handoff

    Using Gitpay

    Create a payment request, share the link, and receive payment online:

    • https://gitpay.me

    CTA

    Get paid for your next deliverable: https://gitpay.me
